message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "risk_area": "Confidentiality",
      "severity": "high",
      "issue": "Potential unauthorized disclosure of Confidential Information",
      "rationale": "If Confidential Information is disclosed without consent, it could lead to competitive disadvantage and legal repercussions.",
      "mitigation": "Implement strict access controls and employee training on confidentiality obligations.",
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "Indemnification",
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "Ambiguity in indemnification obligations",
      "rationale": "Unclear indemnification terms may lead to disputes over liability and financial responsibility in case of breaches.",
      "mitigation": "Clarify the scope of indemnification in the agreement to ensure both parties understand their responsibilities.",
      "confidence": 0.75
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "Limitation of Liability",
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "Capped liability may not cover all potential damages",
      "rationale": "The $50,000 cap may be insufficient to cover significant losses resulting from a breach.",
      "mitigation": "Consider negotiating a higher liability cap based on the potential risks involved.",
      "confidence": 0.70
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "Governing Law",
      "severity": "low",
      "issue": "Jurisdictional challenges",
      "rationale": "Disputes may arise regarding the interpretation of California law, especially if parties are located elsewhere.",
      "mitigation": "Ensure both parties are familiar with California law and consider alternative dispute resolution mechanisms.",
      "confidence": 0.60
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "Data Protection",
      "severity": "high",
      "issue": "Non-compliance with data protection laws",
      "rationale": "Failure to comply with applicable data protection laws could result in significant fines and reputational damage.",
      "mitigation": "Conduct regular audits and training to ensure compliance with data protection regulations.",
      "confidence": 0.80
    }
  ]
}
